channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Harrington defends US Senior Open title with debutant Poulter fourth
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Padraig Harrington notched a four-under 66 in his final round to finish 12 under over the weekend and win the US Senior Open title for the second year running.

item.title: Plateau raises the alarm over rising human trafficking cases
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Plateau State raises alarm over increasing human trafficking cases after rescuing three women trafficked to Mali. Learn about prevention and support for vi
Read More: https://punchng.com/plateau-raises-the-alarm-over-rising-human-trafficking-cases/

item.title: Rowley bemused by decisions in Saints' loss to Wigan
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: St Helens head coach Paul Rowley questioned referee Chris Kendall after his side's agonising 16-14 Super League defeat to derby foes Wigan Warriors at Magic Weekend.

item.title: 'It stinks!' Neville, Trump and Belgium speak out after FIFA allow banned Balogun to play
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: FIFA has stepped in to make banned USA striker Folarin Balogun available for the World Cup last-16 tie with Belgium - a move praised by US President Donald Trump but slammed by Gary Neville.

item.title: Hardcore History’s DanCarlin Explains: Where Do We Go From Here?
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description:
This Independence Day marks the 250th anniversary of America. But with an increasing amount of polarization and conflict, is this holiday able to bring the country together?
Dan Carlin, host of Hardcore History, joins Max Chafkin on this bonus episode of the Everybody's Business podcast to answer t

item.title: 2027: Kwara APC rallies support for Tinubu, Danladi, and others
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Dubbed Kwara Ndupe Rally, the event saw thousands of party faithful March along the major roads of the Ilorin metropolis. The post 2027: Kwara APC rallies support for Tinubu, Danladi, and others appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Lagos Accuses Bloggers, Influencers Of Using Fake Flood Images To Mislead Public
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Lagos State Government has accused some bloggers, social media influencers and political actors of deliberately circulating fake and misleading images and videos of flooding from other states and countries to create what it described as a false narrative about the flood situation in the state. T

item.title: INEC deadline: NDC south-east bloc warns of crisis over candidate imposition
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: From Adesuwa Tsan, Abuja The South-East bloc of the Nigerian Democratic Congress (NDC) has cautioned the party’s national leadership against imposing candidates and delaying the release of outstanding primary election results, warning that such actions could fuel internal crises and weaken the

item.title: Who fathered this child?, By Wole Olaoye
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Thanks to scientific advancement in the form of deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) testing, it is now possible to determine a child’s paternity with a 99.99 per cent certainty. In the light of recent events that have left our collective jaws on the floor, Nigerians are beginning to wish that a governance/p

item.title: Don’t sell your votes, Oyebamiji begs Osun voters
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
APC candidate Bola Oyebamiji appeals to Osun voters not to sell their votes in the August 15 governorship election, urging them to elect him for growth.
Read More: https://punchng.com/dont-sell-your-votes-oyebamiji-begs-osun-voters/

item.title: Police arrest man for attacking cousin with knife, firewood in Katsina
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Katsina State Police have arrested Adam Tama, 20, for allegedly attacking his cousin with knives and firewood, robbing her of phones and cash. Read more on
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-man-for-attacking-cousin-with-knife-firewood-in-katsina/

item.title: Osun 2026: Ansar-Ud-Deen Endorses Oyebamiji, Calls For Peaceful Election
item.dc:creator: Leadership

item.title: World Cup 2026: Balogun cleared to Play as FIFA suspends ban for 12 months
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: FIFA stated that any new violation could also attract additional disciplinary measures alongside the activation of the original sanction.

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The White House contacted FIFA President Gianni Infantino to request a review of Folarin Balogun's red card during the FIFA World Cup, according to a person familiar with the matter. The post White House called FIFA’s Infantino to review Balogun’s red card – report appeared first o

item.title: WAFCON 2026: Super Falcons open camp in Mohammedia July 15
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Holders Super Falcons of Nigeria will open camp in Mohammedia, Morocco on July 15 ahead of their title defence at the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations, DAILY POST reports. The Super Falcons will spend one week in Mohammedia before moving to Rabat for their Group C matches. Head coach Justine

item.title: Quansah set to start at right-back for England
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Jarell Quansah is set to start at right-back for England against Mexico in the World Cup last-16 tie at the Azteca stadium.

item.dc:creator: TechEconomy

The call was made by Vincent Ogbunude, Ma

item.title: Sagamu LG Boss Cries Foul Over Unauthorised Waste Dumping, Vows To Sanction Offenders
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Chairman of Sagamu Local Government has condemned in strong terms the illegal dumping of refuse at Sotubo, describing the act as a direct assault on the authority of the council and a threat to public health. The Chairman, who led an inspection to the site on Sunday, July 5, 2026, said he was an

item.title: Police probe death of woman in church toilet
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The police are investigating the unexplained death of a woman found inside a church toilet in Calabar, saying no evidence of foul play has emerged pending an autopsy. The post Police probe death of woman in church toilet appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: 2026 World Cup: What Ronaldo said about Yamal ahead of Spain vs Portugal clash
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Portugal captain, Cristiano Ronaldo, has hailed Spain’s Lamine Yamal as a player with “a very bright future” ahead of their meeting at the 2026 World Cup. The two countries will face off in the last 32 of the tournament. Ronaldo was asked for his thoughts on Yamal during the pre-ma

item.title: Trump memecoin investors lost $3.8 billion, analysis finds
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Nearly 1 million people have lost a total of $3.8 billion after buying President Donald Trump’s $TRUMP memecoin, while Trump made $636 million.

item.title: Gunmen storm Plateau smoking spot, kill three, injure teenage girl
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Three persons have been killed while a teenage girl sustained gunshot injuries following an attack by suspected Fulani bandits at a smoking spot in Barkin Ladi Local Government Area of Plateau State. The development was disclosed in a report by Zagazola Makama, a counter-insurgency and security expe

item.description: ​The move follows reports that several school administrators had continued to organise these events despite repeated warnings. The post Ebonyi Sets Up Panel To Track, Sanction Schools Violating Ban On Graduation Ceremonies appeared first on Channels Television.

Usman Adamu Ahmed Suphi, has unveiled Alhaji Abdulkadir Alin Bababa as his running mate and commissioned the party’s state secretariat in the state. The event held on Sunday at

item.title: Ronaldo speaks on retirement from football
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo has insisted he will retire from international football on his own terms, dismissing persistent questions about the end of his career ahead of Portugal's FIFA World Cup last-16 clash with Spain. item.title: Zelensky warns of new Russian attacks as battle for Kostyantynivka continues
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: Guinness World Record: Nigerian woman, Habitat finishes six-day bible reading challenge, awaits verification
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Regardless of the final outcome, many Nigerians have praised Habibat for her resilience, perseverance, and commitment to completing a challenge that demanded both physical and spiritual strength.

item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Eze called on Nigerians to disregard what he described as a fabricated report published by a “little-known website” which “falsely” attributed a statement to Jonathan claiming that he was offered such amount.

item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: A shooting at a Fourth of July celebration in the US city of New York wounded eight victims, four of whom are children.

item.title: OPEC+ raises output levels again despite tumbling crude prices
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Major oil producers on Sunday agreed once again to modestly increase their crude production, although, as in previous months, the hike is largely symbolic until a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran sticks and the Strait of Hormuz is fully reopened to shipping traffic.

item.title: 'It's on us' - Mercedes accept blame for Antonelli damage
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Mercedes have accepted the blame for Kimi Antonelli's mechanical failure which likely cost him victory at the British Grand Prix and saw him score no points in the Silverstone race.

item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Naomi Osaka defeated world No. 1 Aryna Sabalenka for the first time in eight years to reach her maiden Wimbledon quarterfinal with a 6-2, 7-6(2) victory on Sunday. Osaka, who had lost to Sabalenka three times already in 2026, produced a dominant display on Centre Court to secure the win in one hour

The collaboration is aimed at promoting intra African trade and addressing obstacles h

item.title: FG raises alarm as two more Nigerians killed in South Africa
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Federal Government has condemned the killing of two more Nigerians in South Africa, warning that it may be forced to take diplomatic action if the continued attacks on its citizens are not halted. The post FG raises alarm as two more Nigerians killed in South Africa appeared first on The Sun Nig

item.title: Fake agency scandal: PDP faction demands Gbajabiamila ouster, independent probe
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The faction states that the scandal has brought embarrassment to the country. The post Fake agency scandal: PDP faction demands Gbajabiamila ouster, independent probe appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: NYSC reforms ‘ll undermine national defence policy – Lawmaker
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Member of the House of Representatives, representing Ado/Okpokwu/Ogbadibo Federal Constituency of Benue State, Philip Agbese, has said recent reforms to the National Youth Service Corps ( NYSC), approved by the Federal Government, could erode the objectives of the scheme and undermine the country's

item.title: Police arrest eight suspected armed robbers, internet fraudsters in Gombe
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Gombe State Police Command arrests eight suspects involved in armed robbery and internet fraud, recovering over N500,000 stolen from victims’ bank accounts
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-eight-suspected-armed-robbers-internet-fraudsters-in-gombe/

item.title: Peter Obi hails African teams, cites Cape Verde as model for Nigeria
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Labour Party presidential candidate, Peter Obi, has congratulated African countries that represented the continent at the FIFA World Cup, saying their performances have made Africa proud. In a post on his X platform on Sunday, Obi reserved special praise for Cape Verde, describing the country’

item.title: Project Nigeria positively despite challenges, Dabiri-Erewa urges diaspora
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Dabiri-Erewa said although Nigeria faces challenges, its citizens, particularly those in the diaspora, should celebrate the nation's success stories and the positive impact Nigerians continue to make across the world. The post Project Nigeria positively despite challenges, Dabiri-Erewa urges diaspor

item.title: America at 250: Democracy’s greatest experiment?
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Chris Hedges reflects on 250 years of US independence - the nation's ideals, contradictions, and what it has become.

item.title: Kano Invests ₦928bn In 1,508 Development Projects
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Kano State Government said it has invested more than ₦928 billion in 1,508 development projects across the state’s 44 local government areas since Governor Abba Kabir Yusuf assumed office, with 799 projects already completed and the remaining 709 at various stages of execution. The Commiss

item.title: Avelay Lyrics by Tekno
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Tekno Lyrics The lyrics of Avelay by Tekno celebrate confidence, financial success, and the enjoyment of life's pleasures. Through catchy melodies and playful expressions, Avelay portrays the singer as hardworking, generous, and always ready to provide when money is needed. It also highlights themes
